_meta.what: GREAT HALL (Affinity Bonuses) — account-level bonuses unlocked per AFFINITY, applied as a PERCENTAGE OF BASE STATS to every champion of that affinity in the collection.
_meta.source: Plarium in-game Help screen, supplied by Mike 2026-07-21. VERBATIM Tier-1 factual game data.
verbatim: In the Affinity Bonuses tab, you can unlock Bonuses for the following 6 Stats: HP, ATK, DEF, C. DMG, RES, ACC
All Bonuses apply to the Champions' Base Stats.
There are multiple Levels of each Bonus - from 0 to 10 - where 0 is not upgraded at all, and 10 is fully upgraded.

For example, if you upgrade the Void HP Bonus to Level 1, all Void Champions in your Collection will immediately receive a 2% boost to their MAX HP. Upgrade that Bonus to Level 10 and they'll receive a 20% boost.
_meta.scope: PER AFFINITY (Magic / Force / Spirit / Void) x PER STAT (6). Not per-faction — that is Faction Guardians, a different system.
unverified: Whether the same level->percent curve applies to ALL SIX stats. Only one bonus's curve was visible in the screenshot (a Magic bonus, stat name obscured); the HP example in the text matches it. VERIFY the ACC/RES/C.DMG curves in-game before relying on them.
Whether the Great Hall has non-affinity tabs beyond Affinity Bonuses.
_meta.why_it_matters: ⚠ OUR CODE HAS THIS BACKWARDS. `estimate-stats.js: applyAccountBonus()` adds FLAT ACC +40 / RES +30 and DELIBERATELY OMITS HP/ATK/DEF, on the stated belief that 'HP/ATK/DEF Great-Hall bonuses are flat in-game (not % of base)'. The game says the opposite: everything is a % of BASE. Measured against our own champion table (944 rows): 604 champions have base_acc = 0 and the non-zero average is 14, so a +20% ACC bonus is worth ~0-3 ACC, NOT 40. Meanwhile base HP averages 17,439, so the +20% HP bonus we discard is worth ~3,488. We invent ~37 ACC that does not exist (~3.7 Spider stages of the stage x 10 ACC floor) and throw away the part that matters.
_meta.modelling_note: Needs the player's per-affinity Great Hall LEVELS, which Gestal does NOT export. Until captured, any substitute should at least have the right SHAPE: percentage-of-base on HP/ATK/DEF/C.DMG, and near-zero on ACC/RES.
